title: Analyze a custom topic from the home page
description: A user can enter a topic on the home page, start analysis, and reach a results state.

steps.description: Fill in the search input field with a topic
Verify analyzed search results are displayed

title: Open the dashboard overview
description: A user can open the dashboard and see the analytics summary, sentiment distribution, and news feed content.

steps.description: Verify the analytics summary is displayed
Verify the sentiment distribution is displayed
Verify the news feed is displayed

title: Analyze a trending topic from the home page
description: A user can choose a trending topic on the home page and start analysis from that selection.

steps.description: Verify analyzed search results are displayed

title: Refine a search before analyzing
description: A user can set a topic, adjust both filters, and then start analysis with the selected refinements.

steps.description: Fill in the search input field with a topic
Verify analyzed search results are displayed

title: Browse a dashboard article for more details
description: A user can browse the news feed on the dashboard and open more details for an article.

steps.description: Click the read more action for an article

title: Start analysis with only a custom topic
description: A user can search with just a typed topic and still reach the analyzed results state.

steps.description: Fill in the search input field with a topic
Verify analyzed search results are displayed

title: Switch dashboard sections from the sidebar
description: A user can use the dashboard sidebar to move to another section and see the displayed content update.

steps.description: Use the sidebar navigation to switch sections
Verify the dashboard content changes to the selected section

title: Move from search to dashboard and confirm both pages render
description: A user can navigate from the home search page to the dashboard route and see both views render correctly.

steps.description: Verify the dashboard page is displayed
Verify the search home page content is no longer displayed

title: Handle an empty search attempt
description: The home page prevents analysis when no topic is provided and shows an empty or validation state.

steps.description: Verify a search validation or empty state is visible
